item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have to. Tuesday wild meme dump
item.description:
1. That's high tech
2. Honestly, I couldn't tell the difference
3. Maybe two trips next time?
4. When leave for the weekend and find out that the local bears are having a pool party
5. What kind of dark sorcery is this?!
6
7
8
9. I bet they decided to split up to (you know, while being in a dark basement)
10
11
12. The high five we all deserve
13
14. My trying to be hella sexy
15.Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! And finally I would like to share with this awesome community my passion project. Me and my brother have started working on games in the past few years. From scratch basically and we learned how to do it on our own. Today I'm proud to say our third game is close to release. It's inspired by the "The Stanley Parable" (same kinda of style and humor) and it would mean the world to us if you wishlisted on Steam. Check out the page here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Just when I felt sorry for Chipotle workers…
item.description: I have felt the righteous anger of the person who wrote this manifesto. P.S. Happy cake day to all imgurians whose cake day is today like me!

item.title: All black Oni Mask
item.description:
Finished up this 3D printed Oni Mask. I want to paint it but not sure what color pattern to choose. File design by Pipe Cox.
Printed on an FLSUN v400 . Here's a short video mid print.
A photo of the finished product.

item.dc:creator: avr0cky

item.title: Welp, that happened
item.description:
He came from the side of me so I didn’t even see it coming but he was millimeters from my face. Since I didn’t see him coming, I didn’t even flinch which pissed him off more. He was yelling something in German that sounded vaguely like “you aren’t welcome in my country” but my German is shit so who knows. I am not gay but I am a supporter and love rainbow colored clothing. The people around me were appalled and stared him down while his friend pulled him back, dude probably saved my nose.
No one better come after rainbow Luciefur or shit will get real.
item.dc:creator: biggaymeow
